Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Req. For Production Of Documents, Specially Prepared Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-01-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Francisco A. Gutierrez, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Jack Wu

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Jack Wu's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. Defendant shall serve complete verified responses without objection and produce documents no later than noon, November 2, 2007. Service shall be by personal delivery. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $980 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
